calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To Jun-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2026 Set For Trial On Nov-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Daniel Galindo, Esq. 628-210-5007 DHG Legal PC for Plaintiff.
Peter Glaessner, Esq. 415-697-2000 Allen Glaessner Hazelwood & Werth LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Tina Tavalero, CSR #8923, 916-337-3152, tinatav@comcast.net

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. The Court hears the Demurrer and MTS simultaneously. Mr. Glaessner contests and presents arguments; religious nature, religious exemption, cites supreme court case. The Court comments. Mr. Galindo responds; corporations code, cites case.vThe Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court takes both motions under submission.

1 - Defendant Catholic Charities CYO of the Archdiocese of San Francisco's demurrer to Plaintiff David Carter's complaint.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman,Court reporter: Tina Tavalero, CSR #8923, 916-337-3152, tinatav@comcast.net Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court prepares an Order overruling Demurrer.***

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Daniel Galindo, Esq. 628-210-5007 DHG Legal PC for Plaintiff.
Peter Glaessner, Esq. 415-697-2000 Allen Glaessner Hazelwood & Werth LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Tina Tavalero, CSR #8923, 916-337-3152, tinatav@comcast.net

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. The Court hears the Demurrer and MTS simultaneously. Mr. Glaessner contests and presents arguments; religious nature, religious exemption, cites supreme court case. The Court comments. Mr. Galindo responds; corporations code, cites case.vThe Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court takes both motions under submission.

2 - Defendant Catholic Charities CYO of the Archdiocese of San Francisco's motion to strike Plaintiff David Carter's complaint.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Tina Tavalero, CSR #8923, 916-337-3152, tinatav@comcast.net, Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
